progress.name: progress
progress.comment: Percent completion of this POW item (0–100)

sort_order.name: sort_order
sort_order.comment: Display order (ascending); ORM orders by sort_order ASC, created_at ASC

variance.name: variance
variance.comment: Variance between estimated and actual cost

estimated_project_cost.name: estimated_project_cost
estimated_project_cost.comment: Total estimated cost (material + labor, or standalone figure)

category.name: category
category.comment: Optional grouping: SITE_PREPARATION, STRUCTURAL, ARCHITECTURAL, MEP, FINISHING, OTHER

publication_status.name: publication_status
publication_status.comment: Publication workflow state: DRAFT (Staff-created), PENDING_REVIEW, PUBLISHED (Admin-approved), REJECTED

submitted_by.name: submitted_by
submitted_by.comment: User who submitted the record for review

submitted_at.name: submitted_at
submitted_at.comment: Timestamp when record was submitted for review

assigned_to.name: assigned_to
assigned_to.comment: Delegated user who can view (non-PUBLISHED) and edit this record. ON DELETE SET NULL clears assignment if user deleted.

sdg_goals.name: sdg_goals
sdg_goals.comment: UN Sustainable Development Goals aligned with this project (array of SDG_n keys)

custom_supporting_sections.name: custom_supporting_sections
custom_supporting_sections.comment: Per-project custom Supporting Document repository folders (rendered as repository cards) — mirrors custom_key_sections

project_notes_banking.name: project_notes_banking
project_notes_banking.comment: GGG-E: Others-tab data banking — additionalNotes, projectReferences[], specialInstructions, historicalReferences[], customMetadata{}

indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX construction_projects_project_code_active_idx ON public.construction_projects USING btree (project_code) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_construction_projects_campus ON public.construction_projects USING btree (campus) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_construction_projects_campus_status ON public.construction_projects USING btree (campus, publication_status) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_construction_projects_created_by ON public.construction_projects USING btree (created_by) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

accomplishments.name: accomplishments
accomplishments.comment: GGG-F WAR: [{description, category, date, percentage, remarks}]

signatories.name: signatories
signatories.comment: GGG-F: [{userId, userName, position, role, date}] — references system users

work_items.name: work_items
work_items.comment: GGG-F MPR: [{itemNumber, description, unit, quantity, unitCost, weightNumber, actualQtyThisPeriod, actualPercentToDate, costToDate}]

billing_amount_this_period.name: billing_amount_this_period
billing_amount_this_period.comment: BBB-C: Billing billed to owner this period (WAR/MPR operational record; Progress Reports is the official record)

financial_accomplishment_percent.name: financial_accomplishment_percent
financial_accomplishment_percent.comment: BBB-C: Financial accomplishment % this period (WAR/MPR operational; Progress Reports is official)

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX idx_fiscal_years_active ON public.fiscal_years USING btree (year) WHERE (is_active = true)
CREATE INDEX idx_of_fund_type_operation ON public.operation_financials USING btree (operation_id, fund_type) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_of_operation_expense ON public.operation_financials USING btree (operation_id, expense_class) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

pillar_indicator_id.name: pillar_indicator_id
pillar_indicator_id.comment: Phase CX-F: Foreign key to pillar_indicator_taxonomy. All indicators must be linked to fixed taxonomy entries. Legacy orphan indicators have been migrated by migration 020.

override_rate.name: override_rate
override_rate.comment: Optional user override for accomplishment rate (%). When set, replaces computed rate in display. Computed rate always recalculated from target/actual separately.

override_rate_q1.name: override_rate_q1
override_rate_q1.comment: Optional per-Q1 override for achievement rate (%). When set, replaces computed Q1 rate in display.

override_rate_q2.name: override_rate_q2
override_rate_q2.comment: Optional per-Q2 override for achievement rate (%). When set, replaces computed Q2 rate in display.

override_rate_q3.name: override_rate_q3
override_rate_q3.comment: Optional per-Q3 override for achievement rate (%). When set, replaces computed Q3 rate in display.

override_rate_q4.name: override_rate_q4
override_rate_q4.comment: Optional per-Q4 override for achievement rate (%). When set, replaces computed Q4 rate in display.

override_variance.name: override_variance
override_variance.comment: Optional annual override for variance (actual - target). When set, replaces computed annual variance in display. Does not affect stored target/actual values.

override_variance_q1.name: override_variance_q1
override_variance_q1.comment: Optional per-Q1 override for variance. When set, replaces computed Q1 variance in display.

override_variance_q2.name: override_variance_q2
override_variance_q2.comment: Optional per-Q2 override for variance. When set, replaces computed Q2 variance in display.

override_variance_q3.name: override_variance_q3
override_variance_q3.comment: Optional per-Q3 override for variance. When set, replaces computed Q3 variance in display.

override_variance_q4.name: override_variance_q4
override_variance_q4.comment: Optional per-Q4 override for variance. When set, replaces computed Q4 variance in display.

override_total_target.name: override_total_target
override_total_target.comment: Phase HA: Optional BAR1 alignment override for displayed Total Target. When set, replaces auto-sum of quarterly targets as base for variance/rate computation.

override_total_actual.name: override_total_actual
override_total_actual.comment: Phase HA: Optional BAR1 alignment override for displayed Total Actual. When set, replaces auto-sum of quarterly actuals as base for variance/rate computation.

catch_up_plan.name: catch_up_plan
catch_up_plan.comment: Phase HE: Catch-up plan narrative for APR/UPR reporting (Not Met Targets)

facilitating_factors.name: facilitating_factors
facilitating_factors.comment: Phase HE: Facilitating factors narrative for APR/UPR reporting (Met Targets)

ways_forward.name: ways_forward
ways_forward.comment: Phase HE: Ways forward narrative for APR/UPR reporting

mov.name: mov
mov.comment: Phase HK: Means of Verification — documentary or observable evidence supporting indicator accomplishment claims

indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_oi_quarterly_per_quarter ON public.operation_indicators USING btree (operation_id, pillar_indicator_id, fiscal_year, reported_quarter) WHERE ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (reported_quarter IS NOT NULL))

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_operation_indicators_orphan ON public.operation_indicators USING btree (operation_id, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM particular)), fiscal_year) WHERE ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (pillar_indicator_id IS NULL))

pillar_type.name: pillar_type
pillar_type.comment: Phase CY: Changed from VARCHAR(50) to operation_type_enum for type consistency with university_operations.operation_type. Migration 016b applied 2026-02-27.

indexes.expression: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX projects_project_code_active_idx ON public.projects USING btree (project_code) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_quarterly_reports_unique_active ON public.quarterly_reports USING btree (fiscal_year, quarter) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_quarterly_reports_unlock_requested ON public.quarterly_reports USING btree (unlock_requested_by) WHERE (unlock_requested_by IS NOT NULL)

publication_status.name: publication_status
publication_status.comment: Publication workflow state: DRAFT (Staff-created), PENDING_REVIEW, PUBLISHED (Admin-approved), REJECTED

submitted_by.name: submitted_by
submitted_by.comment: User who submitted the record for review

submitted_at.name: submitted_at
submitted_at.comment: Timestamp when record was submitted for review

assigned_to.name: assigned_to
assigned_to.comment: Delegated user who can view (non-PUBLISHED) and edit this record. ON DELETE SET NULL clears assignment if user deleted.

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX idx_repair_projects_campus ON public.repair_projects USING btree (campus) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_repair_projects_campus_status ON public.repair_projects USING btree (campus, publication_status) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_repair_projects_created_by ON public.repair_projects USING btree (created_by) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

publication_status.name: publication_status
publication_status.comment: Publication workflow state: DRAFT (Staff-created), PENDING_REVIEW, PUBLISHED (Admin-approved), REJECTED

submitted_by.name: submitted_by
submitted_by.comment: User who submitted the record for review

submitted_at.name: submitted_at
submitted_at.comment: Timestamp when record was submitted for review

assigned_to.name: assigned_to
assigned_to.comment: Delegated user who can view (non-PUBLISHED) and edit this record. ON DELETE SET NULL clears assignment if user deleted.

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX idx_university_operations_campus ON public.university_operations USING btree (campus) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_university_operations_campus_status ON public.university_operations USING btree (campus, publication_status) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_university_operations_created_by ON public.university_operations USING btree (created_by) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_uo_fiscal_year ON public.university_operations USING btree (fiscal_year) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_uo_fiscal_year_campus ON public.university_operations USING btree (fiscal_year, campus) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)

module.name: module
module.comment: Module type: CONSTRUCTION (COI), REPAIR, OPERATIONS, or ALL (full access)

tables.name: user_module_assignments
tables.comment: Tracks which project modules each admin user can manage. Used for scoped pending review access.

module_key.name: module_key
module_key.comment: Module identifier: coi, repairs, contractors, funding_sources, university_operations, users

can_access.name: can_access
can_access.comment: TRUE = grant access, FALSE = revoke access (overrides role default)

tables.name: user_permission_overrides
tables.comment: Stores per-user module access overrides (Admin can grant/revoke module access regardless of role defaults)

tables.name: user_pillar_assignments
tables.comment: Phase HN: Pillar-level access assignments for Physical/Financial modules

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX idx_user_roles_is_superadmin ON public.user_roles USING btree (is_superadmin) WHERE (is_superadmin = true)

rank_level.name: rank_level
rank_level.comment: User rank level for permission hierarchy. Lower = higher authority. 10=SuperAdmin, 20=SeniorAdmin, 30=ModuleAdmin, 50=SeniorStaff, 70=JuniorStaff, 100=Viewer

campus.name: campus
campus.comment: User office/campus assignment for record visibility scoping. Staff users see records matching their campus + own records. Admin/SuperAdmin bypass campus scoping.

status.name: status
status.comment: Phase HU: user lifecycle status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, SUSPENDED)

updated_by.name: updated_by
updated_by.comment: Phase HU: audit — user id of last updater

created_by.name: created_by
created_by.comment: Phase HU: audit — user id of creator

indexes.expression: CREATE INDEX idx_users_google_id ON public.users USING btree (google_id) WHERE (google_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_username_lower ON public.users USING btree (lower((username)::text))
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_email_active_unique ON public.users USING btree (email) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_google_id_active_unique ON public.users USING btree (google_id) WHERE ((deleted_at IS NULL) AND (google_id IS NOT NULL))
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_username_active_unique ON public.users USING btree (username) WHERE (deleted_at IS NULL)
